The Way of Kings by Brandon Sanderson (2010)
★ 4.6 (312045) · 1007 pages · Epic fantasy, Magic, War
Series: The Stormlight Archive
ISBN 9780765326355

Roshar is a world of stone and storms.

Kaladin must lead men through war.
